name: AutopilotFallbackEvent
description: Records of fallback and degraded-mode events when primary models or services are unavailable

department.description: The VELO department where the event occurred

workflow_name.description: The name of the workflow or task

primary_provider.description: The provider that failed (e.g. OpenAI GPT-4)

fallback_provider.description: The provider used as fallback (e.g. Local Llama 3, Manual)

trigger_reason.description: Why the fallback was triggered (credit_exhausted, api_unavailable, etc.)

related_mission_id.description: ID of the mission being executed

related_record_id.description: ID of the specific record being processed (e.g. application_id)
